resource.name: ValueOnHasBeenChangedToToComplyWithTheValueOf
resource.object: {0} value on {1:F1} {4} has been changed to {3:F1} {5} to comply with the value of {2}

resource.name: TheUserLimitsHasAlsoBeenChanged
resource.object: The user limits has also been changed

resource.name: ValueOnCantBeChangedToToComplyWithTheValueOfTheNewValueIsOutsideTechLimits
resource.object: {0} value on {1:F1} {4} CANT be changed to {3:F1} {5} to comply with the value of {2} - the new value is outside tech. limits

resource.name: TheMarkedValuesHasBeenAdjustedAccordingToTheFixedRules
resource.object: The marked values has been adjusted according to the fixed rules

resource.name: ValuesAreInvalid_MustComplyTo
resource.object: Values are invalid - must comply to

resource.name: S.P.Press_exhaust
resource.object: Pressure exhaust calibrated with zero zone 2

resource.name: mt0708.probe_offset
resource.object: EMF offset dew point probe zone 1

resource.name: mt5708.probe_offset
resource.object: EMF offset dew point probe zone 2

resource.name: R.active_recipe.water_bottom_BT.Value
resource.object: Target water on bottom level zone 1

resource.name: R.active_recipe.water_bottom_ST.Value
resource.object: Target water on bottom level zone 2

resource.name: B.P.Press_exhaust
resource.object: Pressure exhaust calibrated with zero zone 2

resource.name: FV0705.Value
resource.object: Control valve exhaust air (Base Tower.Humidity Control)

resource.name: FV5705.Value
resource.object: Control valve exhaust air (Secondary Tower.Humidity Control)

resource.name: FV0717.Value
resource.object: Control valve makeup air (Base Tower.Humidity Control)

resource.name: FV5717.Value
resource.object: Control valve makeup air (Secondary Tower.Humidity Control)

resource.name: B.C.woblevel
resource.object: Current water on bottom level zone 1

resource.name: S.C.woblevel
resource.object: Current water on bottom level zone 2

resource.name: TT0605.Value
resource.object: Temp oil HE in (Base Tower.Temp control)

resource.name: TT0606.Value
resource.object: Temp oil HE out (Base Tower.Temp control)

resource.name: TT5605.Value
resource.object: Temp oil HE in (Secondary Tower.Temp control)

resource.name: TT5606.Value
resource.object: Temp oil HE out (Secondary Tower.Temp control)

resource.name: C.C.Paused
resource.object: cleaning program has stopped on alarm, or belt was stopped, or the user pressed pause

resource.name: C.C.Seconds_In
resource.object: actual wash/pump time during cleaning , belt runs, on wash temperature, and enough water

resource.name: T.C.bd_belt_force
resource.object: Actual base drum frequency drive current

resource.name: T.C.mp_belt_force
resource.object: Actual master pickup frequency drive current

resource.name: T.C.sd_belt_force
resource.object: Actual secondary drum frequency drive current

resource.name: T.C.sp_belt_force
resource.object: Actual slave pickup frequency drive current

resource.name: U.P.Status_Light_Colour
resource.object: Status light (0 = off, 1 = Red, 2 = Yellow, 3 = Green, 4 = White, 5 = Blue)

resource.name: mt0708.ramp_out_htr
resource.object: Ramped target temperature dewpoint probe zone 1

resource.name: mt5708.ramp_out_htr
resource.object: Ramped target temperature dewpoint probe zone 2

resource.name: P.F.Act_fill_pressure_range
resource.object: Min and max pressure between strokes divided by 2

resource.name: RS.Active_recipe.Products_per_row.Value
resource.object: Drum, nr of products per row

resource.name: AirTopKnife
resource.object: Manual valve to top blower knife

resource.name: AirBottomKnife
resource.object: Manual valve to bottom blower knife

resource.name: PleaseSelectMachineToCreateNewProgramFor
resource.object: Please select a machine to create a new program for

resource.name: CantCreateNewProgram
resource.object: Cannot create a new program because

resource.name: PlsMakeSureTemplateIsImportedSeeManual
resource.object: Please make sure the template is imported for the machine, see Further Processing Manual for details.

resource.name: TheSettingsCannotBeSaveBecauseThereAreInvalidValues
resource.object: The settings cannot be saved, because there are invalid values in the program.

resource.name: CorrectTheValuesAndTryAgain
resource.object: Correct the values and try again

resource.name: DoYouWantToDeleteTheProgram
resource.object: Do you want to delete the program ?

resource.name: ThereAreUnsavedProgramChangesDoYouWantToDiscardThose
resource.object: There are unsaved program changes\nDo you want to discard those ?

resource.name: Warning.DeleteSystem
resource.object: Deleting this system will delete stations and programs for the system!

resource.name: Err.DeletingStationChildren
resource.object: Can't delete children of the station.

resource.name: ImportDeviceOffline
resource.object: Device is currently offline. Do you want to open a local template file?

resource.name: ImportDialogTitle
resource.object: Please select a template file for import

resource.name: ImportAbortText
resource.object: Operation is taking longer than expected. Abort operation?

resource.name: FPQCDataControl.Hint
resource.object: Configurable QC data component for FP dashboards

resource.name: FPLinkedLabel.Hint
resource.object: Label where text will taken from the control who opened this linked page
